description.detailed: Valid Pascal, FPC compiles this (just fix first TMyClass, e.g. to not declare explicit ancestor). Generic and non-generic TMyClass are different types.
Invalid Pascal, such relation is not allowed, FPC correctly reports: Error: Forward declaration of class "TMyInterface" must be resolved here to use the class as ancestor
Valid Pascal, FPC compiles this (just fix first TMyInterface, e.g. to not declare explicit ancestor). Generic and non-generic TMyClass are different types.
